---
title: "Reference"
---

These pages contain the test models, node descriptions and Ribasim Python API documentation.

## Node types

::: {layout-ncol=4 style="text-align: center;"}

[![](https://s3.deltares.nl/ribasim/doc-image/node-icons/png/Basin.png){width=60}<br>Basin](node/basin.qmd)

[![](https://s3.deltares.nl/ribasim/doc-image/node-icons/png/TabulatedRatingCurve.png){width=60}<br>TabulatedRatingCurve](node/tabulated-rating-curve.qmd)

[![](https://s3.deltares.nl/ribasim/doc-image/node-icons/png/Pump.png){width=60}<br>Pump](node/pump.qmd)

[![](https://s3.deltares.nl/ribasim/doc-image/node-icons/png/Outlet.png){width=60}<br>Outlet](node/outlet.qmd)

[![](https://s3.deltares.nl/ribasim/doc-image/node-icons/png/UserDemand.png){width=60}<br>UserDemand](node/user-demand.qmd)

[![](https://s3.deltares.nl/ribasim/doc-image/node-icons/png/FlowDemand.png){width=60}<br>FlowDemand](node/flow-demand.qmd)

[![](https://s3.deltares.nl/ribasim/doc-image/node-icons/png/LevelDemand.png){width=60}<br>LevelDemand](node/level-demand.qmd)

[![](https://s3.deltares.nl/ribasim/doc-image/node-icons/png/FlowBoundary.png){width=60}<br>FlowBoundary](node/flow-boundary.qmd)

[![](https://s3.deltares.nl/ribasim/doc-image/node-icons/png/LevelBoundary.png){width=60}<br>LevelBoundary](node/level-boundary.qmd)

[![](https://s3.deltares.nl/ribasim/doc-image/node-icons/png/LinearResistance.png){width=60}<br>LinearResistance](node/linear-resistance.qmd)

[![](https://s3.deltares.nl/ribasim/doc-image/node-icons/png/ManningResistance.png){width=60}<br>ManningResistance](node/manning-resistance.qmd)

[![](https://s3.deltares.nl/ribasim/doc-image/node-icons/png/Terminal.png){width=60}<br>Terminal](node/terminal.qmd)

[![](https://s3.deltares.nl/ribasim/doc-image/node-icons/png/Junction.png){width=60}<br>Junction](node/junction.qmd)

[![](https://s3.deltares.nl/ribasim/doc-image/node-icons/png/DiscreteControl.png){width=60}<br>DiscreteControl](node/discrete-control.qmd)

[![](https://s3.deltares.nl/ribasim/doc-image/node-icons/png/ContinuousControl.png){width=60}<br>ContinuousControl](node/continuous-control.qmd)

[![](https://s3.deltares.nl/ribasim/doc-image/node-icons/png/PidControl.png){width=60}<br>PidControl](node/pid-control.qmd)

:::
